nasb.text: Hear this word which the Lord has spoken against you, sons of Israel, against the entire family which He brought up from the land of Egypt:

esv.text: Hear this word that the Lord has spoken against you, O people of Israel, against the whole family that I brought up out of the land of Egypt:

cnv.text: 以色列人哪！要聽耶和華攻擊你們的這些話，就是攻擊他從埃及地領上來的以色列全家，說：

ccb.text: “以色列人啊， 要听耶和华责备你们的话， 责备我从埃及领出来的整个民族的话，
